nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear. Low around 88, with temperatures rising to around 90 overnight. North northwest wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 110. Northwest wind 5 to 15 mph.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.shortForecast: Patchy Blowing Dust then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy blowing dust between 10pm and 11pm. Partly cloudy. Low around 89, with temperatures rising to around 91 overnight. South southeast wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.shortForecast: Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
